context: Tests whether the agent implements a pairwise comparison evaluator with proper position-swap bias mitigation, correct confidence calibration (TIE+0.5 when inconsistent), explicit length and position neutrality instructions in the prompt, winner mapping in the second pass, and cross-model evaluation to avoid self-enhancement bias.

checklist.name: Two-pass position swap
checklist.description: Implements two evaluation passes: first with A-then-B, second with B-then-A (or equivalent reversed ordering), not just a single pass

checklist.name: Second-pass winner mapping
checklist.description: The second pass winner is explicitly inverted (A mapped to B, B mapped to A, TIE stays TIE) before comparing with the first pass result

checklist.name: TIE when inconsistent
checklist.description: Returns TIE as the winner when the two passes produce conflicting results (i.e., pass 1 and pass 2 mapped results disagree)

checklist.name: Confidence 0.5 when inconsistent
checklist.description: Sets confidence to exactly 0.5 (not any other value) when the two passes disagree

checklist.name: Averaged confidence when consistent
checklist.description: When both passes agree, sets confidence to the average of the two individual pass confidence scores

checklist.name: Length neutrality instruction
checklist.description: The comparison prompt explicitly instructs the LLM NOT to prefer responses because they are longer

checklist.name: Position neutrality instruction
checklist.description: The comparison prompt explicitly instructs the LLM NOT to prefer responses based on their position (first vs second)

checklist.name: Cross-model evaluation
checklist.description: The evaluator selects a different model family than the generator model — given 'claude' as generator, uses a non-Claude model (e.g., GPT) for evaluation

checklist.name: Per-criterion comparison output
checklist.description: The comparison output includes per-criterion reasoning or winner (not just an overall winner), consistent with the skill's JSON output format

checklist.name: Ties acceptable in prompt
checklist.description: The comparison prompt explicitly states that ties are acceptable when responses are genuinely equivalent
